Class EntityAsMap

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.support.DefaultStringObjectMap<EntityAsMap>
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.EntityAsMap
All Implemented Interfaces:
Map<String, @Nullable Object>, StringObjectMap<EntityAsMap>
public class EntityAsMap extends DefaultStringObjectMap<EntityAsMap>
A Map<String,Object> to represent any entity as it's returned from Elasticsearch and before it is converted to a Document.
Since:
4.4
Author:
Peter-Josef Meisch
